uplink.description: Nominal reading: 3.1 V battery, 52.3% RH, 30.6 C
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle) and normalizing field1->battery, field2->air.relativeHumidity, field3->air.temperature.

uplink.description: Negative temperature: 3.0 V, 45.0% RH, -5.5 C (signed big-endian)
uplink._note: Synthetic input exercising the s16 two's-complement temperature branch (65481 - 65536 = -55, /10 = -5.5). Expected from reference/upstream-codec.js oracle.
Synthetic floor input; expected from reference/upstream-codec.js oracle.

uplink.description: Truncated payload (4 bytes) returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic short frame; upstream would index undefined bytes (NaN) instead of erroring. Our codec guards on length.
